name: Proof
description: '''DeShaun Dupree Holton''' (October 2, 1973 – April 11, 2006), known professionally as '''Proof''', was an American rapper from [[Detroit]], [[Michigan]]. He was a member of the groups Soul Intent, 5 Elementz, Funky Cowboys, Promatic, Goon Sqwad, and [[D12]]. A close friend of rapper [[Eminem]] since childhood, Proof was often a [[hype man]] at Eminem's concerts.
